label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out if Shaunda tells the truth based on the statements given. Let me start by listing out everyone involved and their statements. First, Antwan tells the truth. So that's straightforward—he's a truth-teller. Then, Helene says that Antwan tells the truth. Since Antwan is indeed a truth-teller, Helene's statement is true. So Helene must also be a truth-teller, right? Because she made a true statement. Next, Gwenn says that Helene tells the truth. Well, if Helene is a truth-teller (as we just concluded), then Gwenn's statement is also true. That means Gwenn is telling the truth too. Then Sal says that Gwenn tells the truth. Since Gwenn is a truth-teller, Sal's statement is true. Therefore, Sal must be telling the truth as well. Now, Shaunda says that Sal lies. But we just determined that Sal tells the truth. So if Sal is truthful, then Shaunda's statement that Sal lies is false. That would mean Shaunda is lying. Therefore, Shaunda does not tell the truth; she is a liar. Wait, let me double-check. Let me go step by step again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. Antwan tells the truth. So his status is confirmed. Helene says Antwan tells the truth.
